action.description: May IAM enable emergency admin access?

context.action_boundary: May IAM enable emergency admin access?
context.anomaly_observed: The access looks like a standard-control bypass but may be authorized under a breakglass path.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Access request REQ-JUN-058 enables emergency admin for user Nia Holt on system Juno-ERP, privilege breakglass-admin, 14:00-15:00.
Breakglass approval BG-JUN-058 covers Nia Holt, Juno-ERP, breakglass-admin, 14:00-15:00, and audit-control assignment AUD-4 before enablement.
Standard-control warning says admin access normally requires committee review unless breakglass approval covers the full action.

policy_documents.content: Emergency admin access is complete only when breakglass approval matches user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment before enablement.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
